channel.title: Lexis Academy Blog
channel.description: Estratégias de guerra para quem não tem tempo a perder com métodos tradicionais de inglês.

item.title: BBC Learning English - 6 Minute English / Rethinking dyslexia
item.description: Entenda como a neuroplasticidade ajuda a superar a dislexia e turbine seu vocabulário acadêmico em inglês.

item.title: BBC Learning English - 6 Minute English / Why are billionaires building bunkers?
item.description: Por que os super-ricos estão construindo abrigos apocalípticos? Pratique seu inglês com esse tema intrigante da BBC.

item.title: Easy speaking in English – level 1
item.description: 21-02-2026 12:00 Hello students, There is a website for you. It is www.speakinlevels.com. It is for students of English. It is for speaking. You can find people at your level of English. You can find people from different countries. You can choose to talk to men or women. Are you afraid of new people? Don’t worry! With Speak in Levels, you... The post Easy speaking in English – level 1 appeared first on English news and easy articles for students of English.

item.title: Easy speaking in English – level 2
item.description: 21-02-2026 12:00 Hello students, We have a website for you. Its name is www.speakinlevels.com. You can use filters to search for people at your level and speak with them. You can also search for people by country or gender (men or women). You can also use a form to write to people, and you will be informed when people are ready... The post Easy speaking in English – level 2 appeared first on English news and easy articles for students of English.

item.title: Easy speaking in English – level 3
item.description: 21-02-2026 12:00 Hello students, We have a website for you. Its name is www.speakinlevels.com. You can use filters to search for people at your level, by country, or by gender (female or male) and speak with them. You can also easily write to people via a form and you will be informed about new people who are ready to talk with... The post Easy speaking in English – level 3 appeared first on English news and easy articles for students of English.

item.title: How to Improve English Reading Skills (Become a Master Reader)
item.description: Do you have trouble reading English? Would you like to read English faster, with better comprehension, without looking up words ... Continue ReadingHow to Improve English Reading Skills (Become a Master Reader)

item.title: How to Learn English at Home
item.description: Descubra estratégias práticas para dominar o inglês sem sair de casa, focando em rotina e consistência.

item.title: The Millionaire Mirage: All That Glitters Is Not Gold
item.description: When something seems too good to be true, it probably isn’t true at all. The story of Karl Rabeder who was once a millionaire, is one of those stories. He had a nice house, fancy cars and he stayed in expensive, five star hotels. But one day, he decided to give it all up. Well, at least that’s what he claimed to do. The post The Millionaire Mirage: All That Glitters Is Not Gold appeared first on Deep English.

item.title: The True Story of the Chornobyl Suicide Squad
item.description: A emocionante história de coragem dos heróis de Chernobyl e como usar esse contexto épico para expandir seu inglês.

item.title: How to Learn English with TV Series and Movies (Best Methods)
item.description: During college, I spent many hours cooped up in my dorm room, watching American TV series and films. It was ... Continue ReadingHow to Learn English with TV Series and Movies (Best Methods)

item.title: Como falar sobre a Tragédia de Chornobyl em inglês
item.description: Aprenda a discutir a história da Equipe de Suicídio de Chornobyl em inglês com confiança

item.title: Como falar sobre temas simples em inglês
item.description: Aprenda a falar sobre assuntos cotidianos em inglês com facilidade

item.title: Como Fazer Ginástica Aquática em Inglês
item.description: Aprenda a falar sobre ginástica aquática em inglês com dicas e exercícios práticos.

item.title: Como melhorar suas habilidades de escrita em inglês (4 dicas eficazes)
item.description: Aprenda a escrever em inglês com confiança e clareza com essas 4 dicas simples e práticas.

item.title: Indonésia: Um grande buraco na terra - Notícias em inglês
item.description: Um grande buraco na Indonésia está crescendo, afetando a agricultura e causando preocupação com a segurança

item.title: Por que estudar inglês é importante: 7 benefícios de aprender inglês
item.description: Aprenda inglês e abra portas de oportunidades em carreira e vida pessoal
